commands: uv run --frozen --python 3.12 python -m abd_acceptance --contract AC-S03-P03 --evidence machine/evidence
explicit_unknowns: S03/P03 freezes Chinese failure guidance and one local safe next action for every currently declared failure class; it does not implement future phase runtime behavior.
No web, mobile, accessibility, notification or browser interface has been implemented or deployed; S03/P04 human usability and accessibility validation has not started.
TAB, Gmail, OVH and Cloudflare account, authorization, capacity and runtime states remain uninspected or unverified and fail closed.
All resolution vectors are synthetic and offline; no source, account, quote, model, stake or order was selected or executed.
Future phases must version and extend the closed catalog before a new failure state can enter a user interface.
The 30% monthly compounding target remains falsifiable, unverified and not guaranteed; target shortfall cannot relax any gate.

hashes.model_not_executed_reason: S03/P03 freezes deterministic Chinese failure guidance from current signed facts and synthetic fixtures; it executes no prediction model, provider interaction, deployment, order or return evaluation.

detail.baseline: 未实现或旧包存在冲突/缺口
detail.measurement: 由 AC-S03-P03 的机器验收判定器执行固定输入、阈值和证据检查。
non_goals: 不自动提交、确认或重试真实订单
不以降低证据或风险门追赶30%月目标
不引入付费数据或付费程序接口依赖
detail.observation_period: 开发期每次提交；上线后持续
detail.problem: 若未完成“中文错误与下一步”，让用户无需查术语或文档即可操作，机器内部英文不泄漏到日常界面。将缺少可执行、可验收或可恢复的基础。
detail.target: 每个失败状态只有一个明确下一步。
detail.title: 中文错误与下一步
detail.user: 单一账户持有人及自动开发/运维代理
detail.value: 为全部失败路径提供中文原因码和自动下一动作。

environment: Ubuntu Linux 持续集成环境
无外部网络的确定性测试模式
evidence_requirements: 测试报告及命令退出码
输入、参数、代码、模型和输出SHA-256
失败路径截图或结构化日志
inputs: S03/P03 冻结正向、边界、负向和故障输入
参数版本和来源版本哈希

oracle.rule: 每个失败状态只有一个明确下一步。

detail.pass_gate: 每个失败状态只有一个明确下一步。
detail.retention: 永久保留验收摘要；原始大体积证据按运维手册分层保留
detail.rollback: 关闭对应功能开关，恢复上一已签名制品，保留不可变证据并重放派生状态。
stop_condition: 发现法律、监管或来源合同实质冲突且无安全默认
严重安全事故或证据完整性失败

tests.method: 固定输入重放 + 属性测试 + 负向测试 + 故障注入
全部硬阈值在边界、±0.0001及不利赔率跳动下验证
相同输入、配置和制品哈希必须得到相同动作和证据哈希

detail.threshold: 每个失败状态只有一个明确下一步。
detail.title: 中文错误与下一步唯一主验收

detail.message_zh: 系统无法确认当前失败状态，必须按最保守方式处理。

detail.message_zh: 相关能力已隔离，证据会被保留，当前不得继续。

系统拒绝超出范围的动作，并继续已授权的安全任务。
受影响范围停止推进，等待独立复核。

detail.pass_gate: 核心操作中位数≤10分钟、95分位≤20分钟。

checks.name: HUMAN-002 文档与机器真源完全一致
HUMAN-003 人类文档无未解释TTL
FACT-008 用户只做最终下单
MAIL-001 每15分钟确定性收集
MAIL-003 两阶段后移入垃圾箱

detail.purpose: 自动保存 TAB 等已验证来源发来的账单、交易记录、确认邮件及附件，形成可审计证据。

checks.name: MAIL-006 首次授权不阻塞核心

falsification_gate: 月收益率的95%上界仍低于30%
plausible_gate: 保守月度对数增长中位数 >= ln(1.3)
月度对数增长第5百分位 > 0
按来源、平台限额、机会数量和相关性校正后的容量通过
verification_gate: 按现金流调整后的月度几何收益 >= 30%

checks.name: AC-002 每条需求恰好一个对应主验收
TASK-003 开发任务无中途Owner输入
TRACE-001 需求→验收→任务闭合
TRACE-002 测试/证据/制品引用完整
RESEARCH-002 来源字段、URL、日期和裁定完整
RESEARCH-003 官方/论文/开源/标准多源交叉

checks.detail: 只输出一个任务包压缩包、一个Stage/Phase Roadmap和一句Pursuing Goal Prompt。
checks.name: SKILL-001 最终输出规则

return_target.contract: 目标、容量、证伪和12月实际验证；不得因目标短缺降低门槛。

checks.detail:
ABD S00/P03 PAID DEPENDENCY SCAN
STATUS: PASS
FIXED_CLOCK: 2026-07-19T00:00:00+10:00
MAX_INCREMENTAL_CASH_AUD: 0.00
DEPENDENCY_MANIFESTS: 2
RUNTIME_DIRECT_DEPENDENCIES: 0

MANIFESTS
- pyproject.toml
- uv.lock

PACKAGES
- attrs==26.1.0
- colorama==0.4.6
- iniconfig==2.3.0
- jsonschema==4.25.1
- jsonschema-specifications==2025.9.1

PROVIDERS

- RES-GITHUB-EXISTING critical_path=true incremental_cash_aud=0.00
- RES-GMAIL-EXISTING-OPTIONAL critical_path=false incremental_cash_aud=0.00
- RES-OSS-PINNED critical_path=true incremental_cash_aud=0.00
- RES-OVH-EXISTING-VPS1 critical_path=true incremental_cash_aud=0.00

CHECKS

- PASS SCAN-MANIFEST-SET
- PASS SCAN-TOML-PARSE

- PASS SCAN-LOCKED-PACKAGE-ALLOWLIST

- PASS SCAN-IMPORTS-CLASSIFIED
- PASS SCAN-NO-PROHIBITED-RUNTIME-IDENTIFIERS

- PASS SCAN-CRITICAL-PATH-NO-PAID-OR-APPROVAL-BOUND-INTERFACE

BOUNDARY
- Existing resource and opportunity costs are disclosed separately; this report proves only incremental cash cost A$0 for declared dependencies.
- External capability, account plan, quota headroom, deployment, market coverage and returns are not verified by this scan.
- Any new, paid, unknown-cost, unclassified or approval-bound critical dependency fails closed.
